Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 292 [adoption contract][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[m]⸢MU⸣—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mdEN—na-din—⸢NUMUN⸣ [A mLU₂—dIDIM]

(o 1) Šum-iddin, son of Bel-nadin-zeri, [descendant of Amēl-Ea], of his own free will, adopted Aplaya, son of Eriba, descendant of [PN], saying:

o 22

[ina] ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ mAa A-šu₂ ša₂ meri-ba A ⸢m⸣[...]

o 33

⸢a!(ŠA₂-)na lu₂DUMUu₂-tu il-qe₂-ma ⸢um⸣-[ma]

o 44

⸢lu!⸣-u₂ lu₂DUMUu₂-a at-ta U₄ 11-KAM [1/2 ša₂]

(o 4) "You shall be my son! Receive the 11th [1/2, of] Šabaṭu (and) 11th of Simanu of rab-banûtu-prebend, total: 1 day and half of rab-banûtu-prebend before the Lady-of-[Uruk]; the arable land, share which (is) with Bazuzu and the sons of Ardiya, upper length (adjacent to the arable land of) Aplaya with the sons of Eriba, lower length (adjacent to) the street. The sides.

o 55

itiZIZ₂ U₄ 11-KAM₂ ša₂ itiSIG₄ lu₂GAL-DU₃[tu₂]

o 66

PAP 1 u₄-mu 1/2 u₄-⸢mu⸣ lu₂GAL-DU₃u₂-tu IGI dGAŠAN—ša₂—[UNUGki]

o 77

ŠE.NUMUN ḪA.LA ša₂ it-ti mba-zu-zu u

o 88

DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mARAD-ia₂ US₂ AN.TA mAa ⸢KI?⸣

o 99

DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ meri-ba US₂ KI.TA SILA DA⸢at⸣

o 1010

IGI mAa A-šu₂ ša₂ mMU—MU A <m>LU₂—dIDIM KU₃.BABBAR BABBARu₂

(o 10) Aplaya, son of Šum-iddin, descendant of Amel-Ea will proportionally supply white silver. It is the responsibility of Aplaya."

o 1111

[qa]-a-a-ta u₂-ša₂-da-ad GIL mAa

o 1212

15 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR BABBARu₂ nu-uḫ-ḫu-tu ša₂ 1/2 GIN₂

(o 12) Aplaya gave 15 shekels of white silver, struck off of 1/2 shekel, to Šum-iddin, his father, for the rations (he will give to him) until the end of his life.

o 1313

KURUM₆-MEŠ a-di-i u₄-mu ba-laṭ TIL-šu₂ mAa

o 1414

a-na mMU—MU AD-šu₂ id-⸢din⸣ [...]

(o 14) This [...] will not [...].

o 1515

an-⸢ni⸣-ti₃? ul i-bal-[...]

o 1616

⸢ra⸣-šu-tu ša₂ mMU—MU ⸢ul⸣ [...]

(o 16) Šum-iddin's credit will not [...].

o 1717

ina lib₃-bi 2 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR BABBARu₂ ša₂ x [...]

(o 17) From the 2 shekels of white silver of ... [...], he gave rations to Nadaya.

o 1818

KURUM₆-MEŠ a-na fna-da-a ⸢id⸣-[din]

Reverse
r 1r 1

ina 15!(16) GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR BABBARu₂ a-na mMU—MU

(r 1) In the 15 shekels of white silver he has given to Šum-iddin, his father, (there are) up to 2 shekels of white silver which he gave to Nadaya, ... rations of Nadaya, wife of Šum-iddin, daughter of Bel-iddin.

r 22

AD-šu₂ it-ta-din a-di-i ⸢2 GIN₂⸣ KU₃.⸢BABBAR BABBAR⸣u₂

r 33

ša₂ a-na fna-da-a SUMna x NA ⸢KURUM₆⸣-MEŠ

r 44

ša₂ fna-da-a DAM mMU—MU DUMU.MUNUS-su

r 55

ša₂ mdEN—MU

r 66

ka-nak na₄KIŠIB MU-MEŠ

(r 6) Sealing of these sealed documents before: Šamaš-zer-lišir, son of Šamaš-nadin-apli, the bow-maker; Luṣi-ana-nuri, son of Belšunu, descendant of Šangi-Ninurta; Bel-ittannu, son of Nabu-ušallim, descendant of Dannea; Arad-Šamaš, son of Iṣṣur, descendant of Bel-napšu; Dunqa-ili, son of Gimillu, descendant of [PN] (and) Šamaš-iddin, son of [PN].

r 77

IGI mdUTU—NUMUN—GIŠ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—MU—A lu₂ZADIM

r 88

m luE₃—ana—ZALAG₂ A-šu₂ ša₂ m<d>EN—šu₂-nu

r 99

A lu₂SANGA—dMAŠ

r 1010

mdEN—it-tan-nu A-šu₂ ša₂ mdNA₃—u₂-šal-lim

r 1111

A mdan-ne₂-e-a

r 1212

mARAD—dUTU A-šu₂ ša₂ miṣ-ṣur

r 1313

A mdEN—nap-šu₂ mdu-un-qa₂—DINGIR

r 1414

A-šu₂ ša₂ mŠU A ⸢lu₂⸣[...] x [...]

r 1515

mdUTU—MU A-⸢šu₂ ša₂⸣ [...]

r 1616

lu₂UMBISAG <m>dAMAR.⸢UTU⸣—[...]

(r 16) Scribe: Marduk-[...] ... 24th year of Darius, king [...].

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

[...] x ⸢BI? DU? U₂⸣ x x [...]

t.e. 22

MU 24!-KAM₂ mda-⸢ri⸣-[ia-a-muš] ⸢LUGAL⸣ [...]

t.e. 33

ṣu-pur mMU—MU

(t.e. 3) Nail of Šum-iddin.
